title: Savory Crumbly German Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A quick and flavorful one-pot dish featuring savory cabbage leaves, aromatic spices, and a touch of toastiness to create a crumbly texture that's perfect for stir-frying.
instructions: Slice the cabbage leaves and onion into thin strips.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic, sliced onions, salt, black pepper, thyme sprigs, and rosemary sprigs. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Place cabbage leaves on the side of the pan to toast lightly without burning.
Once vegetables are well combined with spices, add toasted cabbage leaves to the pan.
Stir continuously for another 5-7 minutes or until cabbage is tender and fully coated in spices.
Remove from heat immediately after adding cabbage leaves to maintain its crunchy texture.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
